# W7-Base

> Local-first orchestration and GitOps platform built on Docker Compose and the unified `w7` CLI.

W7-Base standardizes local infrastructure management through a directory-based zone model, providing a seamless transition from development to production with built-in compliance and observability.

## Platform Features
- **Zone Isolation:** Life-cycle separation across `@ops`, `@dev`, `@prod`, and `@lab`.
- **Hybrid GitOps:** High-speed webhook synchronization combined with pipeline-driven Gitea Actions.
- **Security & Compliance:** SOPS/AGE secret sealing, interactive `@prod` gates, and static policy enforcement.
- **Advanced Observability:** Built-in Prometheus/Grafana stack with custom W7 platform metrics.

## Operator-facing
- [README.md](README.md): Main operator overview and installation guide.
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Agent and AI-assistant guidance for this monorepo.
- [BRANCHING.md](BRANCHING.md): Branching strategy and branch-naming grammar.
- [RELEASE.md](RELEASE.md): Release cadence and per-train tag-cut procedure.

## Platform Documentation
- [docs/README-LLM.md](docs/README-LLM.md): Concise, LLM-optimized technical usage guide.
- [docs/KNOWLEDGE_BASE.md](docs/KNOWLEDGE_BASE.md): Detailed operational reference and troubleshooting guide.
- [docs/ARCHITECTURE_DIAGRAM.md](docs/ARCHITECTURE_DIAGRAM.md): Network topology and request flow.
- [docs/API_REFERENCE.md](docs/API_REFERENCE.md): `w7` CLI flags and `.w7-meta` schema.
- [docs/SECURITY_POLICY.md](docs/SECURITY_POLICY.md): Zone isolation and trust boundaries.
- [docs/CI_CD_EXAMPLES.md](docs/CI_CD_EXAMPLES.md): Gitea Actions workflow templates.
- [docs/OBSERVABILITY.md](docs/OBSERVABILITY.md): Prometheus and Grafana setup.
- [docs/BACKUP_SCRIPTS.md](docs/BACKUP_SCRIPTS.md): Automated backup guide.
- [docs/DISASTER_RECOVERY.md](docs/DISASTER_RECOVERY.md): Full restoration steps.
- [docs/USER_ONBOARDING.md](docs/USER_ONBOARDING.md): Day 1 operator guide.
- [docs/OMG_GEMINI_AI_WORKFRAME_KB.md](docs/OMG_GEMINI_AI_WORKFRAME_KB.md): Working KB for the `oh-my-gemini-cli` orchestration framework.

## Internal Contracts
- [.shared/W7-CONTRACT.md](.shared/W7-CONTRACT.md): Stack directory and `.w7-meta` schema.
- [.shared/ENV_PRECEDENCE.md](.shared/ENV_PRECEDENCE.md): Env-file overlay precedence rules.
- [.shared/GITOPS_DESIGN.md](.shared/GITOPS_DESIGN.md): Core GitOps and deployment engine architecture.
- [.shared/SECRETS.md](.shared/SECRETS.md): Secret management and SOPS operator guide.
